input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: accelerator pedal position sensor - apps

final_answer: IC.4.5 Accelerator Pedal Position Sensor - APPS Refer to T.4.2 for specific requirements of the APPS
